profile.title: About Me
profile.headline: Hey there! I am Daniel Paiz, an early-career Software & Quality Assurance Engineer dedicated to writing highly performant, well-tested code.
profile.biography1: I enjoy being up to date about new technologies and cybersecurity trends.
profile.biography2: This app showcases the use of Angular v22 with scalability in mind, ensuring maintainability and performance across applications. Here are a few projects I have worked on, demonstrating my journey in software development.

projects.title: E-Commerce System Integration
projects.description: Engineered automated end-to-end integration test suites utilizing modern testing frameworks to guarantee API schema compliance.

projects.title: Angular Weather App
projects.description: This weather app fetches weather data from OpenWeatherMap api for 'Los Angeles', allows user to search for other cities and adjust temperature units. Utilizes proxy configurations to securely manage API keys and ensure seamless integration. Focused on keeping the project modular for scalability, maintainability and debugging.
